pattern: A maximal run of L consecutive ones contributes exactly L*(L+1)/2 all-ones substrings, so scanning once while tracking the current run length gives the total directly.
hints: Only maximal runs of consecutive '1' characters matter - a '0' resets everything.
A run of length L contains L*(L+1)/2 all-ones substrings (one of length 1, two overlapping of length... no: L of length 1, L-1 of length 2, down to one of length L).

Walk the string once, tracking the current run length of consecutive '1's; every time you extend the run by one more '1', add the new run length to a running total (mod 1e9+7), and reset the run to 0 on a '0'.

edge_inputs.description: one long run spanning the whole string
alternating bits means every run has length exactly 1, testing the run reset

stress.description: random binary strings up to the maximum length
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, min(size, 100000))
    s = ''.join(rng.choice('01') for _ in range(n))
    return [s]
